description_long: This is a tall, slender stone monument featuring a rectangular shaft rising from a square base. At the top, there is an elaborate sculptural group depicting three robed human figures, with the central figure elevated above the others, possibly representing a religious or historical scene. The shaft is adorned with carved reliefs and decorative motifs, including floral patterns and possibly symbolic elements. The base is broad and flat, providing stability, and is slightly raised above the ground. The overall surface appears weathered, with a matte, stone-like finish. The monument is likely intended as a commemorative or religious marker, commonly found in urban parks or plazas.
description: A tall stone obelisk with ornate sculptural figures at the top and decorative carvings along its shaft, standing on a square base.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full sculptural group at the top, with three figures clearly visible and detailed carvings on the shaft.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the depth of the sculptural group and the thickness of the shaft, with less detail visible on the figures.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the central figure and the arrangement of the other two, with carvings on the shaft still visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the profile of the figures and the relief work on the shaft, similar to view 1.
attribute_ornamentation: The obelisk features ornate sculptural figures at the top and carved reliefs and floral motifs along the shaft.
attribute_base_design: The base is square, flat, and robust, with a slightly raised platform and minimal decorative features, constructed from the same stone material as the shaft.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is not pointed but instead features a sculptural group of three robed figures, with the central figure elevated above the others.
